description: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Mentioning a sum owed to Ibn al-ʿAsqalānī; an amount he owes for cotton; his cousin (ibn ʿamm) Hiba; Muḥammad; and al-Ḥājj Nāṣir. At the bottom and on verso there is piyyuṭ. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
